verses.1: A Song of Ascents. I cried to the LORD in my trouble, And He answered me.
verses.2: Rescue my soul, LORD, from lying lips, From a deceitful tongue.
verses.3: What will He give to you, and what more will He do to you, You deceitful tongue?
verses.4: Sharp arrows of the warrior, With the burning coals of the broom tree!
verses.5: Woe to me, for I reside in Meshech, For I have settled among the tents of Kedar!
verses.6: Too long has my soul had its dwelling With those who hate peace.
verses.7: I am for peace, but when I speak, They are for war.
